name: Aegon N.V.
description: Aegon N.V. is a leading international financial services holding company that provides life insurance, pensions, and asset management services. Headquartered in The Hague, Netherlands, Aegon operates primarily in the Americas, Europe, and Asia, focusing on helping customers achieve lifetime financial security. Through its diverse portfolio of brands, including Transamerica in the United States, Aegon delivers investment and retirement solutions designed to support long-term financial planning and wealth management.
